reviews.subject: Computer Science
reviews.review: Great professor overall. Lectures are solid and well-paced, though the exams can be a bit challenging. Just make sure to study.

reviews.subject: Computer Science
reviews.review: Very knowledgeable and approachable during office hours. Homework load is reasonable but don't fall behind.

reviews.subject: Data Structures
reviews.review: Hard to follow during lectures. They tend to ramble and go off-topic frequently. Exams are much harder than the practice problems.

reviews.subject: Physics
reviews.review: Great professor overall. Lectures are solid and well-paced, though the exams can be a bit challenging. Just make sure to study.

reviews.subject: Chemistry
reviews.review: Great professor overall. Lectures are solid and well-paced, though the exams can be a bit challenging. Just make sure to study.

reviews.subject: Physics
reviews.review: Absolutely a nightmare. Does not show up for office hours, exams cover material never discussed, and treats students poorly.

reviews.subject: Biology
reviews.review: Hard to follow during lectures. They tend to ramble and go off-topic frequently. Exams are much harder than the practice problems.

reviews.subject: Calculus
reviews.review: Enjoyed the class a lot. The professor gives great feedback on assignments, though the quizzes are quite frequent.

reviews.subject: Anthropology
reviews.review: Very dry lectures and not very accessible outside of class. You are basically teaching yourself the material.

reviews.subject: Linguistics
reviews.review: Absolutely brilliant professor! Explains complex concepts with total clarity. Inspires everyone in the room.

reviews.subject: Astronomy
reviews.review: Very knowledgeable and approachable during office hours. Homework load is reasonable but don't fall behind.

reviews.subject: Literature
reviews.review: Solid choice for this subject. Explains things well, though sometimes slides can be a bit text-heavy. Fair grader.

reviews.subject: Psychology
reviews.review: Grades incredibly harshly and doesn't provide clear feedback. Avoid if you want to protect your GPA.

reviews.subject: Economics
reviews.review: Incredibly passionate about the subject. If you participate and do the readings, you will learn a ton and get an A.

reviews.subject: Mathematics
reviews.review: Terrible experience. The workload is unmanageable and the professor seems completely uninterested in helping students succeed.

reviews.subject: Software Engineering
reviews.review: Completely unorganized and unfair grader. The class average on exams was a failing grade and no curve was provided.

reviews.subject: Biochemistry
reviews.review: Great professor overall. Lectures are solid and well-paced, though the exams can be a bit challenging. Just make sure to study.

reviews.subject: Environmental Science
reviews.review: Great professor overall. Lectures are solid and well-paced, though the exams can be a bit challenging. Just make sure to study.

reviews.subject: Sociology
reviews.review: Amazing lecturer! They make even the most boring topics interesting. Highly recommend taking any class with them.

reviews.subject: Philosophy
reviews.review: Completely unorganized and unfair grader. The class average on exams was a failing grade and no curve was provided.
